_purpose: QBO webhook fires for Invoice 1035 (Mark Cho, tagged 'new'). The invoice has had two reminders sent — REMINDER_1 and REMINDER_2 — both ACTIVE in ar_audit_log. Mark Cho has now paid; QBO Balance is 0. WF02 should: pass IF Balance Zero, UPDATE both ar_audit_log rows to RESOLVED (resolved_at=now, resolved_reason='PAYMENT_DETECTED'), aggregate the two rows into one Slack payload, and post to #ar-payments with reminder_count=2 and contact_name='Mark Cho' (from customer_tags).
_preTestSetup: 1. In QBO sandbox: record a payment against Invoice 1035 so Balance becomes 0.
2. In Supabase: ensure two ACTIVE rows exist for invoice_id='1035' with action_taken IN ('REMINDER_1','REMINDER_2'). If WF01 has not produced these, INSERT them manually for the test:

INSERT INTO ar_audit_log (workflow_run_id, invoice_id, invoice_number, contact_id, contact_email_hash, action_taken, sequence_step, status, currency_code, amount_minor_units, days_overdue, relationship_tag, notes) VALUES

_expectedBehaviour.node9_slackMessage: Customer: Mark Cho, Invoice: #1035 paid $314.28, Reminders: 2, Rows resolved: 2
